content: Soft Q-learning’s underutilized maximum entropy objective can be reframed as an intrinsic curiosity prior for the ICM, turning ICM’s static novelty bonus into a soft policy regularization that encourages sustained exploration instead of one-off novelty-seeking. This fixes the common ICM failure mode where agents get stuck looping on noisy, unpredictably novel trivial states (like flickering screen pixels) by weighting novelty against the soft maximum entropy priority of structured, diverse long-term behavior.
